textByHashes.9a7114af6361256c9d3fc977653c0e510d1b4a47: Hello Effendi! How can I help you?
textByHashes.b07f72abdac53f284dc4c3a3b10eecca24e8c19f: This is the camp of the Bedabin. Talk to our leader, Al Shabim, he'll be happy to chat.
textByHashes.e1141ea0e45b82dcb7514b687447a1a268bde5b3: It is north-east of here effendi, across the trackless desert. It will be a thirsty trip!
